description: Review and release curation pools derived from harmony and playability tiers.

review_priority.p1_core_audit: Core triad and power-chord audit pool.
review_priority.p4_backlog: Advanced, hard, high-position, or lower-priority imported shapes.

release_layer.core_candidate: Foundation shapes that should be reviewed next.
release_layer.color_candidate: Common color shapes for the second review pass.
release_layer.style_extension_candidate: Richer style-specific shapes for selective review.
release_layer.advanced_backlog: Long-tail material kept for future curation.
